item.description:
# Everything Clipboard 1.2.2
- Fixes Configure Paste Stack so it opens a real Paste Stack panel from the toolbar. - Shows the selected-item count before replacing or extending the stack. - Keeps Paste Stack replace, append, clear, and per-item removal controls available in one window. - Includes the latest Settings pasteboard-monitoring and ignored-app picker refinements. - Keeps the bundle identifier, Sparkle signing key, Keychain items, preferences, and local clipboard data continuity unchanged.

# Everything Clipboard 1.2.1
- Keeps selected clipboard-history rows highlighted in blue while the sidebar also has a selection. - Adds right-click assignment to content categories for one item or the current multi-selection. - Adds Audio and Rich to the Content sidebar so the sidebar matches the assignable category list. - Keeps assigned categories searchable, filterable, and persisted with clipboard history. - Keeps the bundle identifier, Sparkle signing key, Keychain items, preferences, and local clipboard data continuity unchanged.

# Everything Clipboard 1.2.0
- Adds a more helpful first-run and empty-state experience. - Makes Quick Paste faster with better ranking, keyboard cues, and arrow-key selection. - Simplifies the default toolbar while keeping power actions available through customization. - Groups clipboard history by day and makes the detail pane more action-first. - Adds smart cleanup actions for common copied text tasks. - Keeps the bundle identifier, Sparkle signing key, Keychain items, preferences, and local clipboard data continuity unchanged.
